Shai Gilgeous-Alexander Commits To Team Canada For Upcoming World Cup, Olympics Cycle
articles.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander committed to Team Canada for the 2027 FIBA World Cup and 2028 Olympics cycle. According to new rules established by coach Gordie Herbert and general manager Rowan Barrett, players must commit for the three-year cycle or they will not be on the roster for those tournaments. "To a certain extent, in the past, we used to say with the national team, get our best players to play. It's not enough," said Herbert, according to the CBC. "It's not enough. You need your best group of players to come in to the national team, commit to the program, commit to the time date." Gilgeous-Alexander will be joined by Lu Dort, RJ Barrett, and Dillon Brooks, among others. Jamal Murray and Andrew Wiggins are notable names who will not be on the roster for the upcoming tournaments.

articles.title: 'Backrooms' viral appeal pushes it to $81M US box office debut
articles.description: A24's latest horror film "Backrooms" grossed over $81 million at the domestic box office — making nearly $120 million worldwide — on just a budget of $10 million. "Backrooms" is just the latest example of low-budget films, alongside "Obsession" (grossing $148 million worldwide on a budget of less than $1 million), outperforming the blockbuster debuts from bigger studios. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman, Yahoo Finance Breaking News Reporter Jake Conley, and Barron's Investor Circle Newsletter editor Josh Schafer discuss this trend in films and methods in viral content creation.

articles.title: 😳Alarm in France over Saliba, he could be out for weeks

Maximum caution and concern over William Saliba in France, as reports from the country suggest the player’s injury worsened last Saturday after the Champions League final, and there is now a risk that he may miss the World Cup. If this issue is confirmed, it would be a very hard blow for Deschamps, as France make their World Cup debut on June 16 against Senegal. All eyes are on Saliba.
